lesson.menu_desc: A first call with a new global colleague -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself & Your Role
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Patrícia Xavier Lima Iwashita | Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself & Your Role

listenings.text: Hi, everyone. My name is David, and I am a senior support engineer based in Austin, Texas. I work with customer success teams around the world. Right now, I am leading the technical side of a big rollout for our premium clients in Latin America. I am also the main point of contact for any deployment questions. Please feel free to reach out to me any time. I am really looking forward to working with all of you.

Hi, this is Priya from the support team in Bangalore. I am calling about the onboarding for your Bradesco account. We are currently setting up the new environment, and the deployment is almost ready. I would like to schedule a short call this week to align on the scope of the project. Could you let me know what time works for you on Thursday? Thank you so much, and talk soon.
